claims.text: The tower derrick was equipped with two multi-cable skip machines at elevation +66.3 m and one multi-cable cage machine at elevation +74.9 m.
claims.snippet: The tower derrick was equipped with two multi-cable skip machines at elevation +66.3 m and one multi-cable cage machine at elevation +74.9 m.

claims.text: An overhead crane with capacity of 60 t was installed at elevation of 83 m.
claims.snippet: An overhead crane with capacity of 60 t was installed at elevation of 83 m.

claims.text: Two intake bunkers each with capacity of 145 m3 were placed at elevation of 26.1 m.
claims.snippet: Two intake bunkers each with capacity of 145 m3 were placed at elevation of 26.1 m.

claims.text: Tower derrick had outside dimension 21.9×21.9 m and the height of 90 m.
claims.snippet: Tower derrick had outside dimension 21.9×21.9 m and the height of 90 m.

claims.text: The wall thickness was 300 m above elevation of 0 m.
claims.snippet: The wall thickness was 300 m above elevation of 0 m.

claims.text: The foundation piling of the structure had 4 piles with a diameter of 3.2 m and 20-26 m long, placed at outward corners of the tower derrick.
claims.snippet: The foundation piling of the structure had 4 piles with a diameter of 3.2 m and 20-26 m long, placed at outward corners of the tower derrick.

claims.text: The construction process involved the method of layer-by-layer concreting.
claims.snippet: The construction process involved the method of layer-by-layer concreting.

claims.text: The tower derrick construction design used ArchiCAD and AutoCADMEP software with 3D modeling of the derrick.
claims.snippet: The tower derrick construction design used ArchiCAD and AutoCADMEP software with 3D modeling of the derrick.

claims.text: On the passage of the shaft, a mechanical method – drilling the shaft with a Robbins 73RH drilling unit of Atlas Copco (Sweden) with an expander 3.65 m was applied.
claims.snippet: На проходке ствола применен механический способ - выбуривание ствола с помощью буровой установки Robbins 73RH компании Atlas Copco (Швеция) с расширителем 3,65 м.

claims.text: For strengthening and reinforcement of the shaft, a special three‑storey suspended shelf structure was developed.
claims.snippet: Для укрепления и армировки ствола специалистами ОАО «Институт «Уралгипроруда» разработана специальная конструкция подвесного трехэтажного полка.

claims.text: the accepted mechanized drivage method will enable reducing capital costs of BSS construction
claims.snippet: the accepted mechanized drivage method will enable reducing capital costs of BSS construction

claims.text: the elimination of the aggravating effect of drilling-and-blasting on enclosing rocks will ensure the shaft stability
claims.snippet: the elimination of the aggravating effect of drilling-and-blasting on enclosing rocks will ensure the shaft stability

claims.text: the shaft stability will allow using lighter support types
claims.snippet: the shaft stability ... will allow using lighter support types

claims.text: the construction time will be shortened as against the conventional shafting technology
claims.snippet: the construction time will be shortened as against the conventional shafting technology

claims.text: BSS is intended to hoist ore to surface at a skip hoist capacity of 250 thou t per year
claims.snippet: BSS is intended to hoist ore to surface at a skip hoist capacity of 250 thou t per year

claims.text: BSS length is 307 m, cross section is circular with an inside diameter of 3.65 m
claims.snippet: BSS length is 307 m, cross section is circular with an inside diameter of 3.65 m

claims.text: Amount of stone drivage during construction of BSS and a set of underground openings will make round 28.5 thou m 3
claims.snippet: Amount of stone drivage during construction of BSS and a set of underground openings will make round 28.5 thou m 3
